actual_title: Search and Sorting as Foundational Algorithms

cards.title: Search Space
cards.governance_note: Define the search space, predicate, completeness condition, stopping rule, and exclusions.

cards.title: Ordering Rule
cards.governance_note: Document keys, comparators, stability, tie-breaking, ranking objective, and exposure effects.

cards.title: Retrieval Traceability
cards.governance_note: Preserve query logs, index versions, scores, source metadata, and ranking evidence.
